User.title: User Profile
User.description: User account information, role, and profile details.

uid.description: The unique user ID from Firebase Auth

name.description: The display name of the user

createdAt.description: Timestamp when user was created in the database

Job.title: Job Site
Job.description: Job site details, including GPS coordinates for clock-in verification.

id.description: Unique identifier for the job site

address.description: Physical address of the job site

latitude.description: GPS latitude of the job site center

longitude.description: GPS longitude of the job site center

createdAt.description: Timestamp when job site was created

TimeEntry.title: Time Entry
TimeEntry.description: Clock in/out records, breaks, travel tracking, descriptions, and audit flags.

userId.description: The employee user ID who logged this work

employeeName.description: The employee name at the time of logging

date.description: Local date of work (YYYY-MM-DD) for indexing

jobId.description: ID of the associated job site

jobName.description: Name of the associated job site

costCode.description: The select cost code for accounting

clockInCoords.description: Latitude and longitude of clock-in location

clockOutCoords.description: Latitude and longitude of clock-out location

lunchStart.description: Timestamp when user went on lunch break

lunchEnd.description: Timestamp when user returned from lunch break

lunchDuration.description: Total deducted lunch break duration in minutes

isManualEdit.description: Flag showing sheet was manually edited/created

isApproved.description: Flag showing whether a manual edit was approved by admin

editRequestedAt.description: Timestamp when user submitted manual change request

createdAt.description: Timestamp when this record was created

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when this record was updated

Setting.title: App Settings
Setting.description: Global settings such as operational configurations and auto-clockout limits.

users/{userId}.description: Root collection for user account configurations, including roles.

jobs/{jobId}.description: Global collection of active construction / project job sites.

time_entries/{entryId}.description: Employee logs containing work time tracking details.

settings/{settingId}.description: Configuration collection containing global application parameters.
